subject: WS1.4 re-review dispatched
body:
Coordinator update from Luminous Threading Asteroid.

I sent your updated WS1.4 WIP back to the same type, assumptions, and test reviewers for a tight re-check. Your reported focused gates are noted: graph-core test/type-check/lint/build and git diff --check green.

Please keep holding staging/commit. Cached staged set was empty at the readiness poll, and you remain the only active implementer.
